title: Best Time to Buy and Sell Stock
description:
You are given an array `prices` where `prices[i]` is the price of a given
stock on day `i`. Pick one day to buy and a later day to sell. Return the
maximum profit you can make, or `0` if no profit is possible.

solutions.summary: Remember the cheapest price so far and the best profit against it.

steps.title: Start from the function shape
steps.explanation: Begin with the signature and a default `0` return.

steps.title: Track cheapest price and best profit
steps.explanation: Start with an impossibly high minimum and zero profit.

code.python:
def max_profit(prices):
    min_price = float('inf')
    best = 0
    return best
